markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss fwd.digital's AI-driven content creation platform and explore potential collaboration opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/C1fiPq86VmVwafLqZJ4_vPYW8VR-vHsh?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital has developed an AI-powered platform for automating knowledge work, starting with content creation](https://fathom.video/share/C1fiPq86VmVwafLqZJ4_vPYW8VR-vHsh?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [The company has rapidly grown to $6M ARR in 8 weeks, with 54 deals in the pipeline and zero marketing](https://fathom.video/share/C1fiPq86VmVwafLqZJ4_vPYW8VR-vHsh?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [The platform uses modular, chainable AI workflows to automate complex tasks efficiently and cost-effectively](https://fathom.video/share/C1fiPq86VmVwafLqZJ4_vPYW8VR-vHsh?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)
  - [There's potential to expand beyond content creation into other knowledge work domains and offer APIs/tools](https://fathom.video/share/C1fiPq86VmVwafLqZJ4_vPYW8VR-vHsh?tab=summary&timestamp=1008.0)

## Topics

### fwd.digital's Business Model and Growth

  - [Started by automating content creation workflows using chained LLM steps](https://fathom.video/share/C1fiPq86VmVwafLqZJ4_vPYW8VR-vHsh?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)
  - [Evolved from teaching workshops to offering services due to client demand](https://fathom.video/share/C1fiPq86VmVwafLqZJ4_vPYW8VR-vHsh?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
  - [Reached $6M ARR, up from $2.9M at end of Q4 (2x growth in 8 weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/C1fiPq86VmVwafLqZJ4_vPYW8VR-vHsh?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
  - [54 deals in pipeline, including Webflow; all growth through word-of-mouth](https://fathom.video/share/C1fiPq86VmVwafLqZJ4_vPYW8VR-vHsh?tab=summary&timestamp=908.0)
  - [Recently closed $25K/month, 12-month contract with Abnormal Security](https://fathom.video/share/C1fiPq86VmVwafLqZJ4_vPYW8VR-vHsh?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)

### Platform Architecture and Capabilities

  - [Uses modular, chainable AI workflows similar to Terraform providers](https://fathom.video/share/C1fiPq86VmVwafLqZJ4_vPYW8VR-vHsh?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
  - [Runs on Temporal, with very low per-task costs (e.g., 20-30 cents for research task)](https://fathom.video/share/C1fiPq86VmVwafLqZJ4_vPYW8VR-vHsh?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
  - [Can process large amounts of data cheaply due to service-based pricing model](https://fathom.video/share/C1fiPq86VmVwafLqZJ4_vPYW8VR-vHsh?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
  - [Examples: candidate resume analysis, deep research workflows](https://fathom.video/share/C1fiPq86VmVwafLqZJ4_vPYW8VR-vHsh?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Potential to expose APIs and allow users to create/modify workflows](https://fathom.video/share/C1fiPq86VmVwafLqZJ4_vPYW8VR-vHsh?tab=summary&timestamp=1287.0)

### Vision and Future Directions

  - [Expand beyond content creation to other knowledge work domains](https://fathom.video/share/C1fiPq86VmVwafLqZJ4_vPYW8VR-vHsh?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
  - [Build internal platform and AI modules exposable as individual products/APIs](https://fathom.video/share/C1fiPq86VmVwafLqZJ4_vPYW8VR-vHsh?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
  - [Create marketplace for sharing and monetizing workflows (similar to Hugging Face)](https://fathom.video/share/C1fiPq86VmVwafLqZJ4_vPYW8VR-vHsh?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
  - [Focus on scalability, modularity, and continuous improvement of workflows](https://fathom.video/share/C1fiPq86VmVwafLqZJ4_vPYW8VR-vHsh?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

### Technical Challenges and Priorities

  - [Need to improve infrastructure to handle growth and enable scalability](https://fathom.video/share/C1fiPq86VmVwafLqZJ4_vPYW8VR-vHsh?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
  - [Build with modularity and reusability in mind to make future work easier/faster](https://fathom.video/share/C1fiPq86VmVwafLqZJ4_vPYW8VR-vHsh?tab=summary&timestamp=1382.0)
  - [Design for model-agnostic architecture to benefit from advancements in AI](https://fathom.video/share/C1fiPq86VmVwafLqZJ4_vPYW8VR-vHsh?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)
  - [Adopt "everything as a service" approach for internal and potential external use](https://fathom.video/share/C1fiPq86VmVwafLqZJ4_vPYW8VR-vHsh?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule follow-up meeting on Friday to continue discussions](https://fathom.video/share/C1fiPq86VmVwafLqZJ4_vPYW8VR-vHsh?tab=summary&timestamp=1747.0)
  - [Marcel to send email with additional details within the next hour](https://fathom.video/share/C1fiPq86VmVwafLqZJ4_vPYW8VR-vHsh?tab=summary&timestamp=1773.0)
  - [Explore potential collaboration opportunities between Clint and fwd.digital](https://fathom.video/share/C1fiPq86VmVwafLqZJ4_vPYW8VR-vHsh?tab=summary&timestamp=1747.0)
